notes: Collapsible theme picker with original emblems, surface patterns, shadows, and shapes
Collapsible Franchises within the tile-based Collection home
Endless discovery feed with one-tap Wishlist and each month's Top 10 anticipated games
Opt-in Friend Wishlists shared only with verified Steam friends across all apps
Standalone phone Steam library, playtime, achievements, and friend data
Mobile performance improvements with all existing on-device data retained
